title: Xbox’s next big games showcase happens on June 7th
headline: Xbox’s next big games showcase happens on June 7th
deck: It may be the end of March, but gaming companies are already getting ready for the summer. First up is Xbox, which just announced that it will be holding its next major showcase event on June 7th. That's a typical window
